overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of an armored fantasy character exploring a rainy medieval harbor. The character moves from a wooden ship onto stone docks and walks along a narrow waterfront path toward a stone tunnel entrance, passing wooden scaffolding and shacks.

events.description: character stops walking and turns to face companions on the deck
character walks off the ship deck onto the stone dock

agents.ego_description: standing with companions on the rain-soaked ship deck, then walking toward the dock edge

notable_agents.action: companion in grey tunic with arms crossed, looking at the character
companion in dark clothing standing nearby in the rain

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks of the ship's deck with rope coils
furled white canvas sail attached to the wooden mast
tall grey stone wall of the harbor fortification
tall wooden ship mast with thick rope rigging
network of thick ropes and lines from the mast

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a wooden ship deck during a rain shower. The armored character stands with two companions near the ship's railing, with a large white sail and wooden mast visible. The stone walls of the harbor rise in the background as rain begins to fall more heavily.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone dock with stairs and wooden harbor shacks

events.description: steps off wooden ship onto grey stone dock surface
ascends wide stone stairs along the waterfront

agents.ego_description: walking along the stone dock and up the stairs, passing NPCs resting by the water's edge

notable_agents.action: robed figure sitting on the dock edge looking out at the water
armored guard standing near the stone building entrance

entered.detail: grey stone paved dock area with wooden posts
wide stone staircase leading up from the dock to upper level
small wooden hut with sloped roof on the dock
wooden ship with white sails docked at the harbor
stacked wooden barrels and crates on the dock

segments.scene_description: The character steps off the ship onto a grey stone dock, passing wooden barrels and a small shack. They ascend wide stone stairs along the waterfront, where a robed figure sits by the water and an armored guard stands near a building entrance. Rain continues to fall on the stone surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow waterfront path with wooden scaffolding leading to tunnel

events.description: moves from open stone dock onto narrow dirt path along the water
approaches the large stone archway tunnel entrance

agents.ego_description: walking along the narrow waterfront path toward the stone tunnel, passing under wooden scaffolding and platforms

entered.detail: narrow muddy path along the water's edge with debris
tall wooden support structures and overhead walkways
tall rocky cliff face rising directly from the water
small wooden hut on stilts over the water
large stone archway with metal doors leading into darkness

segments.scene_description: The character moves onto a narrow dirt path running alongside the water, with tall wooden scaffolding structures overhead and a stone cliff wall rising from the water. They walk past a small wooden fishing hut and approach a large stone tunnel entrance at the end of the path, with rain continuing to fall throughout the journey.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the deck of a wooden ship onto the rain-slicked stone docks of a medieval harbor. It begins amidst a rain shower on the ship's deck, where an armored character and two companions stand near a large white sail and wooden mast. As the rain intensifies, the camera follows the character stepping off the vessel and onto the grey stone quay, passing by wooden barrels and a small shack. The scene then shifts as the character ascends wide stone stairs along the waterfront, moving past a seated robed figure and an armored guard stationed by a building entrance.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rainy waterfront path that leads from an open dockside toward the mouth of a stone tunnel. It begins as the character steps onto a narrow dirt trail running parallel to the water, moving beneath the looming presence of tall wooden scaffolding. As the character advances, the scene shifts past a small wooden fishing hut while a steep stone cliff wall rises sharply from the water's edge. The path then narrows and draws the camera forward through the persistent rain, finally culminating at the dark opening of a large stone tunnel entrance.
